_note: CareyRPG pack — the proven 22x format (v3.1 Content Engine §3.1). Generates ART ONLY; title text is composited afterward as a real text layer, never diffused.
template: {subject} from {game}, dark fantasy background, glowing skill icons arranged along the right side as rank bars, S A B tier framing, {palette} palette, {lighting}, dramatic depth, empty upper-left zone for composited text
negative: text, letters, words, captions, watermark, blurry, low contrast, extra fingers
